title: Ray's Better Camel-Husk
description: A refined undead camel resource pack  - lighter fur tones and better see-through ribs to better match undead desert mobs.
body:
# Better Undead Camel Husk
### Sun-Bleached and Undead ☀️🌵

The Camel Husk deserves to look like it truly belongs in the desert. Ray's Better Camel Husk refines the undead camel with a lighter, sand-worn tone and a more realistic, more-transparent ribcage — capturing that eerie, dried-out look of something long lost to the dunes.

🐪 Features

Lightened fur tone to blend naturally with desert mobs

Subtle texture refinements for a smoother, cohesive look

Faithful to vanilla style — just enhanced

![Before & After image of the resource pack in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d88dde1d3e23347c85f1e9f315197e105cadae6a.jpeg)

🛠 Future ideas
<details> <summary>Click to see what's coming</summary>

Alternative texture variants with differing decay levels

Slight model tweaks for improved ribcage visibility

Optional darker “ancient husk” variant

</details>

Credits & License
By XrayWizz. All Rights Reserved (ARR) 
— please credit if you use it in projects.

PS: Note this resource pack only applies to Minecraft Snapshot 25w44a, and future versions.
